mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gas_worker_inspection (worker_plan_id, worker_id, inspect_date, has_danger, inspect_desc, inspect_photo, inspect_result) VALUES (#{workerPlanId}, #{workerId}, #{inspectDate}, #{hasDanger}, #{inspectDesc}, #{inspectPhoto}, #{inspectResult})
mapper.update: UPDATE gas_worker_inspection SET has_danger = #{hasDanger}, inspect_desc = #{inspectDesc}, inspect_photo = #{inspectPhoto}, inspect_result = #{inspectResult}, inspect_date = #{inspectDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT i.id AS id, i.worker_plan_id AS workerPlanId, i.worker_id AS workerId, DATE_FORMAT(i.inspect_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS inspectDate, i.has_danger AS hasDanger, i.inspect_desc AS inspectDesc, i.inspect_photo AS inspectPhoto, i.inspect_result AS inspectResult, u.area_code AS areaCode, u.address AS userAddress, u.building_info AS buildingInfo, CONCAT( IFNULL((SELECT area_name FROM tbl_area_node WHERE code = SUBSTRING_INDEX(u.area_code, '/', -1)), ''), IFNULL(u.address, ''), IFNULL(u.building_info, '') ) AS fullAddress, (SELECT area_name FROM tbl_area_node WHERE code = SUBSTRING_INDEX(u.area_code, '/', -1)) AS areaName FROM gas_worker_plan p LEFT JOIN gas_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gas_worker_inspection i ON i.worker_plan_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{workerPlanId} LIMIT 1

SELECT i.id AS id, i.worker_plan_id AS workerPlanId, i.worker_id AS workerId, DATE_FORMAT(i.inspect_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS inspectDate, i.has_danger AS hasDanger, i.inspect_desc AS inspectDesc, i.inspect_photo AS inspectPhoto, i.inspect_result AS inspectResult FROM gas_worker_inspection i WHERE i.id = #{id}
